name: Select

unions.name: Config
unions.comment: Opaque type that holds all the configuration

unions.name: Msg
unions.comment: Opaque type for internal library messages

unions.name: State
unions.comment: Opaque type that holds the current state

aliases.name: RequiredConfig
aliases.comment:
Required initial configuration

  - onSelect: A message to trigger when an item is selected
  - toLabel: A function to get a label to display from an item
  - filter: A function that takes the typed query and the list of all items, and return the filtered items.
aliases.type: { filter : String.String -> List.List item -> Maybe.Maybe (List.List item), toLabel : item -> String.String, onSelect : Maybe.Maybe item -> msg, toMsg : Select.Msg item -> msg }

values.name: newConfig
values.comment: Create a new configuration. This takes as `RequiredConfig` record.
values.type: Select.RequiredConfig msg item -> Select.Config msg item

values.name: newState
values.type: String.String -> Select.State

values.name: queryFromState
values.comment:
Return the query string from the current state model

    Select.queryFromState model.selectState
values.type: Select.State -> Maybe.Maybe String.String

values.name: update
values.comment:
Update the component state

    SelectMsg subMsg ->
        let
            ( updated, cmd ) =
                Select.update selectConfig subMsg model.selectState
        in
            ( { model | selectState = updated }, cmd )
values.type: Select.Config msg item -> Select.Msg item -> Select.State -> ( Select.State, Platform.Cmd.Cmd msg )

values.name: view
values.comment:
Render the view

    Select.view
        selectConfig
        model.selectState
        model.items
        selectedItems
values.type: Select.Config msg item -> Select.State -> List.List item -> List.List item -> Html.Html msg

values.name: withClear
values.comment:
Remove the clear button entirely

    Select.withClear False
values.type: Basics.Bool -> Select.Config msg item -> Select.Config msg item

values.name: withClearAttrs
values.comment:
Add attributes to the clear button

    Select.withClearAttrs [ class "clear" ] config
values.type: List.List (Html.Attribute msg) -> Select.Config msg item -> Select.Config msg item

values.name: withClearHtml
values.comment:
Use your own html for the clear icon

    Select.withClearHtml (Just (text "X")) config
values.type: Maybe.Maybe (Html.Html msg) -> Select.Config msg item -> Select.Config msg item

values.name: withClearSvgAttrs
values.comment:
Add attributes to the clear SVG icon

    Select.withClearSvgAttrs [ class "clear" ] config
values.type: List.List (Html.Attribute msg) -> Select.Config msg item -> Select.Config msg item

values.name: withCustomInput
values.comment:
Allow users to write a custom values (free text entry)
You must provide a function that converst a String into an item

    Select.withCustomInput (\string -> item) config
values.type: (String.String -> item) -> Select.Config msg item -> Select.Config msg item

values.name: withCutoff
values.comment:
Set the maxium number of items to show

    Select.withCutoff 6 config
values.type: Basics.Int -> Select.Config msg item -> Select.Config msg item

values.name: withEmptySearch
values.comment:
Show results if the input is focused, but the query is empty.
Similar to a dropdown, focusing on the input will show the menu.

Default is False.

    Select.withEmptySearch True config
values.type: Basics.Bool -> Select.Config msg item -> Select.Config msg item

values.name: withHighlightedItemAttrs
values.comment:
Attributes for the hightlighted tem

    Select.withHighlightedItemAttrs [ class "red" ] config
values.type: List.List (Html.Attribute msg) -> Select.Config msg item -> Select.Config msg item

values.name: withInputAttrs
values.comment:
Add attributes to the input

    Select.withInputAttrs [ class "col-12" ] config
values.type: List.List (Html.Attribute msg) -> Select.Config msg item -> Select.Config msg item

values.name: withInputControlAttrs
values.comment:
Add attrs to the input control

    Select.withInputControlAttrs "control-class" config
values.type: List.List (Html.Attribute msg) -> Select.Config msg item -> Select.Config msg item

values.name: withInputWrapperAttrs
values.comment:
Add attributes to the input wrapper (element that wraps the input and the clear button)

    Select.withInputWrapperAttrs [ class "col-12" ] config
values.type: List.List (Html.Attribute msg) -> Select.Config msg item -> Select.Config msg item

values.name: withItemAttrs
values.comment:
Add attributes to the items

    Select.withItemAttrs [ class "border-bottom" ] config
values.type: List.List (Html.Attribute msg) -> Select.Config msg item -> Select.Config msg item

values.name: withItemHtml
values.comment:
Custom item element HTML

    Select.withItemHtml (\i -> Html.li [] [ text i ]) config

When this is used the original `toLabel` function in the config is ignored.
values.type: (item -> Html.Html msg) -> Select.Config msg item -> Select.Config msg item

values.name: withMenuAttrs
values.comment:
Add attributes to the menu

    Select.withMenuAttrs [ class "bg-white" ] config
values.type: List.List (Html.Attribute msg) -> Select.Config msg item -> Select.Config msg item

values.name: withMultiInputItemAttrs
values.comment:
Add attributes to an individual selected item

    config
        |> Select.withMultiInputItemAttrs [ class "bg-white" ]
values.type: List.List (Html.Attribute msg) -> Select.Config msg item -> Select.Config msg item

values.name: withMultiInputItemContainerAttrs
values.comment:
Add attributes to the container of selected items

    Select.withMultiInputItemContainerAttrs [ class "bg-white" ] config
values.type: List.List (Html.Attribute msg) -> Select.Config msg item -> Select.Config msg item

values.name: withMultiSelection
values.comment: Use a multi select instead of a single select
values.type: Basics.Bool -> Select.Config msg item -> Select.Config msg item

values.name: withNotFound
values.comment:
Text that will appear when no matches are found

    Select.withNotFound "No matches" config
values.type: String.String -> Select.Config msg item -> Select.Config msg item

values.name: withNotFoundAttrs
values.comment:
Attributes for the not found message

    Select.withNotFoundAttrs [ class "red" ] config
values.type: List.List (Html.Attribute msg) -> Select.Config msg item -> Select.Config msg item

values.name: withNotFoundShown
values.comment:
Hide menu when no matches found

    Select.withNotFoundShown False config
values.type: Basics.Bool -> Select.Config msg item -> Select.Config msg item

values.name: withOnFocus
values.comment:
Add a callback for when the input field receives focus

    Select.withOnFocus OnFocus
values.type: msg -> Select.Config msg item -> Select.Config msg item

values.name: withOnQuery
values.comment:
Add a callback for when the query changes

    Select.withOnQuery OnQuery
values.type: (String.String -> msg) -> Select.Config msg item -> Select.Config msg item

values.name: withOnRemoveItem
values.comment:
Message to call when removing an individual item. Please note that without this option
specified, you will not be able to remove an individual item from MultiSelect mode.

    Select.withOnRemoveItem OnRemoveItem
values.type: (item -> msg) -> Select.Config msg item -> Select.Config msg item

values.name: withPrompt
values.comment:
Add a prompt text to be displayed when no element is selected

    Select.withPrompt "Select a movie" config
values.type: String.String -> Select.Config msg item -> Select.Config msg item

values.name: withPromptAttrs
values.comment:
Add attributes to the prompt text (When no item is selected)
Select.withPromptAttrs "prompt" config
values.type: List.List (Html.Attribute msg) -> Select.Config msg item -> Select.Config msg item

values.name: withTransformQuery
values.comment:
Transform the input query before performing the search
Return Nothing to prevent searching

    transform : String -> Maybe String
    transform query =
        if String.length query < 4 then
            Nothing
        else
            Just query

    Select.withTransformQuery transform config
values.type: (String.String -> String.String) -> Select.Config msg item -> Select.Config msg item
